page_metadata.biotools__summary: Omixer is a R package for multivariate and reproducible sample randomization to proactively counter batch effects in omics studies. Omixer ensures optimal sample distribution across batches with well-documented methods, and can output intuitive sample sheets for the wet lab if needed.
